_doc: See docs/20-architecture-refactor.md §4.5. Phase A ships this file in placeholder mode; Phase C.7 flips it to enforce with real numbers.

proxy._comment_perDirectoryCoveragePct: Populated with real post-refactor numbers in Phase C.7. Leaving this as {} avoids baking in directory names that Phase E will migrate; the gate treats missing-dir in the live report as 'not a regression' (§4.5).

enforcement._comment_allowUntestedFiles: Legacy src/ files intentionally uncovered by L1 tests. Shrink this list over time; the gate blocks any *new* addition.
